name: deepseek-web
description: Local daemon that drives a logged-in chat.deepseek.com Chrome page via Playwright, plus an OpenAI-compatible API shim — call DeepSeek web (deep-thinking / web-search / expert / vision) for free from any OpenAI-style tool, with no API key and no per-token billing.
//: 守护进程用 `npm start`(=node server.js) 启动；被别的项目当库引用时 require('deepseek-web') 拿到的是瘦客户端 client.js（见 exports/main）。二者互不影响。
